title: Visualizing the Gradient of a Vector-Valued Function
description: A diagram showing the components of a vector-valued function's gradient, which is a matrix (Jacobian) containing all first-order partial derivatives of each component function with respect to each input variable.
relationships: The gradient of F is the Jacobian matrix J
J is constructed by taking the partial derivative of each component function fᵢ with respect to each input variable xⱼ
Each row of J corresponds to the gradient of a component function ∇fᵢ
The (i, j) entry of J is ∂fᵢ/∂xⱼ
